name: dds-sweet-shack
description: Lead-generation website for DD's Sweet Shack.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && vite build && node scripts/prerender-static.mjs dist
scripts.build:gh-pages: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && vite build --outDir ../gh-pages --emptyOutDir false && node scripts/prerender-static.mjs ../gh-pages
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:gh-pages && cd ../gh-pages && git add . && git commit -m "save" && git push
